steps: 1. Запусти reverse.py по нужной монете и окну времени.
3. Возьми blocks.base.filter и замени им объект filter в cfg.json.
4. Запусти main.py и оцени поток кандидатов глазами.
5. Если кандидатов мало — переходи на soft. Если мусора много — переходи на strict.

copy_paste_json.soft:
{
  "filter": {
    "timeframe": "1m",
    "lookback_candles": 59,
    "min_score_pct": 75.8,
    "approximation": {
      "enabled": true,
      "min_match_pct": 95.0
    },
    "regime": {
      "enabled": true,
      "min_corridor_pct": 5.54,

      "min_chop": 49.8,

      "max_slope_to_corridor_ratio": 0.392
    },
    "wicks": {

      "long_wick_ratio": 1.85,

      "min_two_sided_wick_share": 0.23,
      "min_two_sided_share_per_candle": 0.1,
      "max_two_sided_imbalance": 3.0
    },
    "axis": {

      "recent_window": 24,
      "min_axis_touch_share": 0.538,

      "min_rotation_count": 11,
      "mode_bins": 31,
      "use_hlc3": true,
      "close_weight": 0.5,
      "hlc3_weight": 0.5
    },
    "wall": {
      "enabled": true,

      "min_recent_wall_touch_share": 0.0,
      "min_full_wall_touch_share": 0.028,
      "top_k_highs": 8,
      "bottom_k_lows": 8,

    },

      "min_path_to_corridor_ratio": 6.3,

    },

}
